items.title: Delve halts demos, Insight Partners scrubs investment post amid ‘fake compliance’ allegations
items.summary: After a whistleblower alleged that the startup fabricated audit evidence, its prominent Series A investor removed an article detailing why it led the deal.

items.title: Emil Michael, now a senior Pentagon official, says he’ll never forgive Uber investors who ousted him and Kalanick
items.summary: When asked whether he was still "salty" about about being shown the door at Uber, alongside co-founder Travis Kalanick, Michael didn't equivocate. "I'll never forget that, nor forgive," he said.

items.title: Bengaluru food delivery startup Swish raises $38M, its third round in 18 months
items.summary: Swish has more than doubled its valuation in a year as its full-stack, hyperlocal model positions ultra-fast food delivery as a high-frequency habit.

items.title: Despite bitter rivalry, Kalshi, Polymarket CEOs back $35M predictions markets VC fund
items.summary: As prediction markets explode, the new firm called 5(c) Capital, will back startups supporting the burgeoning category.

items.title: Air Street becomes one of the largest solo VCs in Europe with $232M fund
items.summary: London’s Air Street Capital has raised a large Fund III with eyes locked on backing early-stage European and North American AI companies.

items.title: Apple Maps may be about to get ads
items.summary: Apple Maps may soon serve ads in top results when users search on terms like "restaurants."

items.title: Someone has publicly leaked an exploit kit that can hack millions of iPhones
items.summary: Leaked "DarkSword" exploits published to GitHub allow hackers and cybercriminals to target iPhone users running old versions of iOS with spyware, according to cybersecurity researchers.

items.title: Zipline snaps up another $200M to fuel its drone delivery expansion
items.summary: The funding adds to a previous round, announced in January,  that valued the drone startup at $7.6 billion.

items.title: Bernie Sanders’ AI ‘gotcha’ video flops, but the memes are great
items.summary: Sen. Bernie Sanders thinks he's tricked Claude into revealing the AI industry's secrets, but he really just exposed how agreeable chatbots can become.

items.title: Russian authorities block paywall removal site Archive.today
items.summary: A notice on the popular paywall-bypass website Archive.today said that access is blocked "by decision of [Russian] public authorities."

items.title: Bipartisan bill seeks to ban sports betting on Kalshi and Polymarket
items.summary: Since FanDuel and DraftKings are subject to state-by-state gambling laws, rather than federal law, they would not be impacted by the bill.

items.title: Vibe-coding startup Lovable is on the hunt for acquisitions
items.summary: Lovable's founder said the fast-growing vibe-coding startup is looking for startups and teams to join its company.

items.title: Apple sets June date for WWDC 2026, teasing ‘AI advancements’
items.summary: Apple will host its next Worldwide Developers Conference the week of June 8. The company is expected to announce major updates to Siri with advanced AI capabilities.

items.title: DoorDash introduces relief payments for drivers as the Iran-US war drives up gas prices
items.summary: Gas is one of the largest expenses for delivery drivers. With prices continuing to surge, DoorDash is offering a lifeline to Dashers with a new relief program.

items.title: Leonid Radvinsky, the owner of  OnlyFans, has passed away
items.summary: OnlyFans owner Leonid Radvinsky has passed away at the age of 43 after a battle with cancer.

items.title: Startup Gimlet Labs is solving the AI inference bottleneck in a surprisingly elegant way
items.summary: Gimlet Labs just raised an $80 million Series A for tech that lets AI run across NVIDIA, AMD, Intel, ARM, Cerebras and d-Matrix chips, simultaneously.

items.title: Littlebird raises $11M for its AI-assisted ‘recall’ tool that reads your computer screen
items.summary: Littlebird is building an AI that reads your screen in real time to capture context, answer questions, and automate tasks, without relying on screenshots.

items.title: Grab to buy Foodpanda Taiwan from Delivery Hero for $600 million
items.summary: Grab will acquire Delivery Hero’s Foodpanda business in Taiwan for $600 million, expanding beyond Southeast Asia and setting up a closer challenge to Uber Eats in a tightly contested market.

items.title: Elizabeth Warren calls Pentagon’s decision to bar Anthropic ‘retaliation’
items.summary: In a letter to Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth, Senator Elizabeth Warren (D-MA) equated the DOD's decision to label Anthropic a "supply-chain risk" as retaliation, arguing that the Pentagon could simply have terminated its contract with the AI lab.

items.title: FBI says Iranian hackers are using Telegram to steal data in malware attacks
items.summary: Hackers working for Iran’s government are using Telegram in hacking operations that use malware to target dissidents, opposition groups, and journalists who oppose its regime, according to the FBI.
